global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with prominent text and call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel service for hotels and flights.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the entire background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: RouteBloon logo
elements.description: The logo features bold, modern typography in a large size, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main text description
elements.description: A clear, concise text in a friendly font that communicates the service offered, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Service details
elements.description: Additional text that elaborates on the main service, presented in a slightly smaller font below the main text.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with a contrasting color that invites users to take action, located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A simple circular shape in a lighter shade of purple, adding visual interest to the background.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the background, providing a subtle contrast to the circular element.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The headline is bold and large, capturing attention with its strong typography at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Service tagline
elements.description: A tagline that succinctly describes the service, placed prominently in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Offer button
elements.description: A smaller call-to-action button that encourages users to engage with the offer, located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern and vibrant, RouteBloon logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline, body text in the center, and CTA buttons at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: RouteBloon, Fly smarter, Hotels + flights in one tap, Get offer
